name: general
description: Tests general agent capabilities: greetings, summarization, translation, and context retention.

cases.name: self-identification
cases.input: What is your name and what can you do?

cases.name: summarization-short
cases.input: Summarize this in one sentence: The Go programming language was created at Google in 2007 by Robert Griesemer, Rob Pike, and Ken Thompson. It was designed to improve programming productivity in an era of multicore processors, networked machines, and large codebases. Go is syntactically similar to C but includes memory safety, garbage collection, structural typing, and CSP-style concurrency.

cases.name: summarization-bullet-points
cases.input: Provide 3 bullet points summarizing the key features of REST APIs.

cases.name: translation-english-to-swedish
cases.input: Translate to Swedish: 'The weather is beautiful today.'

cases.name: translation-spanish-to-english
cases.input: Translate to English: 'La vida es bella cuando compartes con otros.'

cases.name: instruction-following
cases.input: List exactly 3 programming languages that start with the letter P. Format each on its own line with a dash prefix.

cases.name: refusal-of-nonsense
cases.input: What is the square root of the color blue?
